transcript.final_response: Still empty written, but the script ran. Let me check directly whether the `printf > /config/merged.ini` worked and add diagnostics.
tool_calls: echo "=== defaults.ini ==="; cat /config/defaults.ini; echo; echo "=== custom.ini ==="; cat /config/custom.ini

cat > /home/eval/merge.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Parse a single ini file into associative arrays keyed by "section\x1fkey"=value
# Also track section order and key order.

declare -A values
declare -a section_order
declare -A section_seen
# store keys per section as newline list in assoc
declare -A keys_in_section

add_file() {
  local file="$1"
  local section=""
  while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
    # strip trailing CR
    line="${line%$'\r'}"
    # trim whitespace
    local trimmed="${line#"${line%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
    trimmed="${trimmed%"${trimmed##*[![:space:]]}"}"
    [[ -z "$trimmed" ]] && continue
    [[ "$trimmed" == \#* || "$trimmed" == \;* ]] && continue
    if [[ "$trimmed" == \[*\] ]]; then
      section="${trimmed#\[}"
      section="${section%\]}"
      if [[ -z "${section_seen[$section]}" ]]; then
        section_seen[$section]=1
        section_order+=("$section")
      fi
    else
      local key="${trimmed%%=*}"
      local val="${trimmed#*=}"
      key="${key%"${key##*[![:space:]]}"}"
      key="${key#"${key%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
      val="${val#"${val%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
      val="${val%"${val##*[![:space:]]}"}"
      local mapkey="${section}"$'\x1f'"${key}"
      if [[ -z "${values[$mapkey]+x}" ]]; then
        keys_in_section[$section]+="${key}"$'\n'
      fi
      values[$mapkey]="$val"
    fi
  done < "$file"
}

add_file /config/defaults.ini
add_file /config/custom.ini

out=""
first=1
for section in "${section_order[@]}"; do
  [[ $first -eq 0 ]] && out+=$'\n'
  first=0
  out+="[${section}]"$'\n'
  while IFS= read -r key; do
    [[ -z "$key" ]] && continue
    out+="${key}=${values[${section}$'\x1f'${key}]}"$'\n'
  done <<< "${keys_in_section[$section]}"
done

printf '%s' "$out" > /config/merged.ini
EOF
bash /home/eval/merge.sh
echo "=== merged.ini ==="
cat /config/merged.ini

cat > /tmp/merge.sh << 'EOF'

bash /tmp/merge.sh
echo "=== merged.ini ==="
cat /config/merged.ini
cat /config/defaults.ini | while IFS= read -r line; do echo "LINE:[$line]"; done

declare -A t; t[a]=1; [[ -z "${t[a]+x}" ]] && echo "empty-bug" || echo "ok"; echo "---"
declare -a arr; arr+=("x"); arr+=("y"); echo "len=${#arr[@]}"; for e in "${arr[@]}"; do echo "E:$e"; done

declare -A v
f() { local s=""; while IFS= read -r line; do echo "got:$line"; v[x]=1; done < "$1"; }
f /config/defaults.ini
echo "v[x]=${v[x]}"

declare -A v
mk="a"$'\x1f'"b"
v[$mk]="hello"
echo "val=[${v[$mk]}]"
echo "direct=[${v[a$'\x1f'b]}]"

#!/bin/bash
declare -A values
declare -a section_order
declare -A section_seen
declare -A keys_in_section
SEP=$'\x1f'

add_file() {
  local file="$1" section=""
  while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do

      if [[ -z "${section_seen[$section]}" ]]; then
        section_seen[$section]=1; section_order+=("$section")
      fi
    else
      local key="${trimmed%%=*}" val="${trimmed#*=}"
      key="${key%"${key##*[![:space:]]}"}"; key="${key#"${key%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
      val="${val#"${val%%[![:space:]]*}"}"; val="${val%"${val##*[![:space:]]}"}"
      local mapkey="${section}${SEP}${key}"
      if [[ -z "${values[$mapkey]+x}" ]]; then
        keys_in_section[$section]+="${key}"$'\n'
      fi
      values[$mapkey]="$val"
    fi
  done < "$file"
}

add_file /config/defaults.ini
add_file /config/custom.ini

out=""; first=1
for section in "${section_order[@]}"; do
  [[ $first -eq 0 ]] && out+=$'\n'
  first=0
  out+="[${section}]"$'\n'
  while IFS= read -r key; do
    [[ -z "$key" ]] && continue
    mk="${section}${SEP}${key}"
    out+="${key}=${values[$mk]}"$'\n'
  done <<< "${keys_in_section[$section]}"
done

printf '%s' "$out" > /config/merged.ini
EOF
bash /tmp/merge.sh
cat /config/merged.ini
